citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 10:20 am on March
20,2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by phone and waited 30 minutes. Failure to provide access to
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:

the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
